title: Craftformers Prime
description: Craftformers Prime is a Minecraft mod that puts Transformers into your Minecraft gameplay. There are many Transformers mods that are outdated and discontinued, however, this will be updated regularly.
body:
![Craftformers Prime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54bc8ee229aa026a7cc353234aeb82c338298a9a.png)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e484487f3b969d3b5e6a6906f02cb92c86ab12e6.png)

Craftformers Prime is a Minecraft Mod that puts Transformers into your Minecraft gameplay. There are many Transformers Mods that are outdated and discontinued, however, this will be updated regularly.

I'd first like to say that We do not own any official Transformers characters or content. All rights to the Transformers IP belong to Hasbro. This is a fan-made project created out of passion and respect for the franchise.

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ba8f37fd9a83b6865dd3a32be6dfaa40af34ad.png)

To install the mod and roll out with us, there are two methods!

1. If you already have the Modrinth app, press "Install" and then you can either add it to an existing profile or make a new one! Then you're all set!
2. If you don't have Modrinth, click download and you'll get the jar file for the Craftformers mod. Then install Forge 1.20.1 and click Install client. Go to your .minecraft folder in %appdata% and drag the Craftformers jar to the mods folder. You're all set!

![Frequently Asked Questions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d75da475cfe6e127966b7ce786afada327f68210.png)

**Will you create mods for the other transformer universes like G1 or Bayverse?**

_This is still being decided, the choice is up to all of the developers. If we believe it's something that we want to do, we'll do it. However, if we decide to not do it, we'll create something even better_

**How do I build the groundbridge in the Craftformers Prime mod?**

_Build the groundbridge like the image attached_

![Ground Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f729cbb41140c4b602711f1827d64f30422a906.webp)

**Will Craftformers Prime be avaliable on Aternos?**

_Unfortunately, as of September 2024, Aternos believes that our mod is not popular enough to be there, but with your support we can change that!_
- _Update, It's the 19th of October 2024, out mod is now avaliable on Aternos!_

**How do you eat food as a Transformer?**
_As a transformer, you are only able to eat Energon. You can find Energon by mining, the best way is to find caves!_#

**Will I be able to become a Transformer in Survival instead of using commands?**
_As of September 2024, no._

**Will Transformers be able to spawn as entities?**
_There is something planned for this, maybe spawn eggs._
- _Update, It's the 1st of November 2025, we have Scraplets!_

**Will Craftformers be avaliable for other editions?**
_No. Craftformers will only be avaliable for Java edition._

**Will you add concept arts or combiners to the Mod?**
_We aren't sure yet, but if we do, it's not coming until the basics of the mod is completed._

**Will there ever be real scaling for the Transformers?**
_Probably, but we're not focusing on it right now. Our main focus is finishing the basics of the mod THEN scaling._

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53cb53b887ae5443c379770c7f5b0bc7eeea5114.png)

If you have any bug reports, suggestions, or just wanna hang out with a great community, join our discord!
**Discord:** https://discord.gg/DredB54XUf
